title: ModClient
description: Client modpack with mods to optimize, improve visuals and game experience
body:
ModClient is a Quilt modpack that will make your gaming experience more convenient and enjoyable by adding 140+ client mods and 20+ resource packs.
Features added by these mods include:
- all functions of optifine
- chat improvements
- optimization improvements
- GUI enhancements
- in-game data pack, resource pack loader
and more.

If you have any questions or found any shortcomings, write to me at discord(sinedkadis)

Cool extra features:
<details>
<summary>Movement macros (Playerautoma)</summary>
  
With this cool mod you can record your movements and clicks, and after it - play recording. Also you can save your macros for later

</details>

<summary>Axiom</summary>
  
New cool building mod, like world edit, but better
